title: Kenyan Curry Veal Stew
description: A flavorful and spicy stew originating from Kenya, made with tender veal and a rich curry sauce.

ingredients.name: Kenyan curry powder
ingredients.notes: Available at most African or Indian grocery stores

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the veal and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the veal from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the curry powder to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the coconut milk, honey, salt, and pepper to the pot.
Return the veal to the pot and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, until the veal is tender, about 2 hours.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
